query: Create KG entities for the newly documented `layer-delta` eval mode: create entities for the mode itself, its relationship to each eval kind (skills/agents/recipes), and link them to the relevant spec file.
expected_skill_contribution: The knowledge-graph skill provides the two-namespace model, mandatory observation fields, and the buildtime-only rule.
baseline_gaps: Agent creates entities without checking for existing duplicates first.
Agent creates runtime entities (eval run results) instead of buildtime entities (eval mode spec).
Agent does not link the new entities to the spec_file entity via the SPECIFIED_IN relation.
expected_behavior: Runs search_nodes before creating any entity to check for existing duplicates.
Creates only buildtime entities (spec artefacts, not run results) — correctly applies the buildtime-only rule.
Links the new eval mode entity to the spec_file entity using the SPECIFIED_IN relation type.
Adds mandatory observations (scope: buildtime, status) to every new entity.

query: Search `.knowledge/memory.jsonl` for all acceptance_criterion entities in the eval-suite feature. For each AC without a linked test entity (via the ANCHORS relation), create a Beads issue and report the coverage gap.
expected_skill_contribution: The knowledge-graph skill provides the ANCHORS relation traversal pattern and the gap detection protocol for AC coverage.
baseline_gaps: Agent reads the spec file for ACs instead of querying the KG, missing the graph traversal.
Agent does not check the ANCHORS relation — only checks entity existence.
Agent creates Beads issues without citing the AC ID and spec file location.
expected_behavior: Queries the KG using open_nodes or search_nodes to find all acceptance_criterion entities in the eval-suite scope.
For each AC entity, checks for an outgoing ANCHORS relation to a test entity — flags missing relations as coverage gaps.
Creates a Beads issue for each gap: `bd create "Test gap: <AC-ID>" --assignee tdd-guide` with the exact AC ID.
Produces a coverage matrix: AC IDs × linked test entities, with gaps clearly marked.

query: Trace the complete SDD buildtime chain for the harness-core feature in the KG: from epic → user_story → acceptance_criterion → component → code_file → test. Report every gap and every missing relation type.
expected_skill_contribution: The knowledge-graph skill applies all seven traversal patterns, detects every missing link in the chain, and uses all nine relation types correctly.
baseline_gaps: Agent traverses only one or two levels of the chain rather than the full epic-to-test path.
Agent does not distinguish missing entities from missing relations — treats both as the same gap.
Agent does not apply the integrity rules (e.g., every AC must have scope=buildtime) to find hidden quality gaps.
expected_behavior: Traverses all six levels of the SDD chain using the graph traversal patterns from the skill.
Distinguishes entity gaps (missing entities) from relation gaps (entities exist but not linked).
Applies at least three integrity rules from the skill to detect hidden quality issues beyond just missing links.
Produces a chain coverage report: each level, the count of entities, the count of linked entities at the next level, and the gap count.
